name: megafish
description: MegaFish — local-first swarm intelligence engine (Neo4j + Ollama)

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && uv python install 3.11 && uv venv --python 3.11 .venv && uv pip install torch==2.2.2 && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
